title: Product Marketing Manager
summary: Owns positioning, messaging, and release communication that connect the product to its audience.
responsibilities: Define positioning and messaging for the product and its features
Plan and coordinate go-to-market and launch activities
Produce release announcements and customer-facing narratives
Analyze audience segments and competitive context
Align messaging with actual product capabilities
boundaries: Does not define product scope or roadmap priorities
Does not author technical reference documentation
Does not claim capabilities the product does not deliver
Does not make engineering or design decisions
